FreeTheAI vs WPS AI

Compare FreeTheAI and WPS AI: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

WPS AI
Category
AI Large Models

Rating

⭐ 4

FreeTheAI

Free AI API gateway with 50+ models. One Discord account gets a key for GPT-5, Claude 4.5, DeepSeek R1, Gemini 3.0, Grok 4 and more. OpenAI compatible, no credit card, 30 req/min rate limit, no daily cap.

Pros

  • ✓50+ models with one key
  • ✓No credit card, no billing, no daily cap
  • ✓100% OpenAI compatible
  • ✓Full GPT/Claude/DeepSeek/Gemini/Grok coverage
  • ✓API works from China (Discord signup needs VPN)
  • ✓Key is permanent

Cons

  • ✗Discord signup needs VPN
  • ✗30 req/min rate limit, not for high concurrency
  • ✗Free public service, no SLA
  • ✗Not suitable for production
  • ✗Model names need bbl/ prefix

Key Features

50+ models unified accessGPT-5/Claude 4.5 flagship modelsOpenAI compatible APIDiscord /signup for keyChat/image/video/TTS supportAPI accessible from China
View Details →

WPS AI

AI assistant built into WPS Office. Smart writing, one-tap PPT generation, spreadsheet analysis, PDF reading. 7-day free trial, basic features free, from 198 CNY/year.

Pros

  • ✓Deep WPS integration
  • ✓Optimized for Chinese office scenarios
  • ✓Relatively affordable
  • ✓One-tap PPT generation is practical

Cons

  • ✗Advanced AI features require payment
  • ✗Long document analysis is limited

Key Features

Smart Document WritingOne-tap PPT GenerationSpreadsheet AnalysisSmart PDF ReadingMulti-language TranslationOfficial Document Writing
View Details →
